authMethod: Direct Supabase password grant (manual email + password, no automatic sign-in)
backendUsedReason: Native iOS app calls Supabase Auth directly — no backend route needed for owner sign-in

corruptedValuesFixed: SUPABASE_URL (was pasted terminal output, now https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co)
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (was pasted terminal output, now clean JWT)
IVX_SUPABASE_URL (was pasted terminal output, now clean URL)
RENDER_API_KEY (had 'Render  key ' prefix, now clean key)

ownerSignInFlow.passwordStorage: none (cleared after each sign-in, in-memory session only)
ownerSignInFlow.onSuccess: Shows live session proof (user ID, email, expiry) + Sign Out button

whyTwoCodebasesClarification.reason: ios-ivx is the native iOS app (Swift/SwiftUI). expo is the cross-platform app (React Native for Android + landing page). Both share the same Supabase backend and owner credentials.
